Bonus was determined by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors of Newmark Group, Inc, (which is a public company), as part of its annual review of compensation for its named Executive Officers.

Annual Year-End Performance Bonus for 2024, cash payment and equity award of freely tradeable shares. Approved by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors, consistent with the Newmark Group, Inc. Incentive Bonus Compensation Plan, the Newmark Group, Inc. Long Term Incentive Plan, and the Newmark Holdings, L.P. Participation Plan. To be paid on or about January 23, 2025. The Compensation Committee of the Board of Director takes into account many factors including but not limited to achieving specified performance goals, but payment (form and amount) is discretionary. The Compensation Committee works with independent compensation consultants who advise with respect to peer metrics and other market factors. (2017-12-01)

Bonus was determined by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors of BGC Group, Inc. (which is a public company), as part of its annual review of compensation for its named Executive Officers.

Annual Year-End Performance Bonus for 2024, cash payment. Approved by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors, consistent with the BGC Group, Inc. Incentive Bonus Compensation Plan and the BGC Group, Inc Long Term Incentive Plan. To be paid on or about January 23, 2025. The Compensation Committee of the Board of Director takes into account many factors including but not limited to achieving specified performance goals, but payment (form and amount) is discretionary. The Compensation Committee works with independent compensation consultants who advise with respect to peer metrics and other market factors. (1999-12-01)
I will forfeit any unvested restricted stock units upon my separation. (2024-04-01)
The distribution of DRS shares is to be treated consistent with the standard practice pursuant to the partnership agreement

Consistent with the Cantor partnership agreement that governs the DRS distribution, which permits distribution to a partner at any time, the underlying shares will be distributed and subsequently divested. (2018-11-01)

The Newmark Group, Inc. Compensation Committee has determined and awarded exchangeability of Filer’s non-exchangeable units immediately upon being reported favorably out by the Senate Committee such that these assets can be divested. (2025-01-01)

The Newmark Group, Inc. Compensation Committee has determined and awarded Filer’s preferred units be converted into cash immediately upon being reported favorably out by the Senate Committee. (2025-01-01)
